          if key < best_element

end

def solve(nums, queries)
  ans = []
  queries.each do |li, ri, threshold|
    freq = Hash.new(0)
    (li..ri).each do |i|
      num = nums[i]
      freq[num] += 1
    end
    max_freq = -1

    freq.each do |key, count|
      if count >= threshold
        if count > max_freq
          max_freq = count
          best = key
        elsif count == max_freq
          best = [key, best].min
        end
      end
    end
    ans << best
  end
  ans
end
```
